com.marklogic.spring.batch.item.reader

Class ValuesItemReader

  • java.lang.Object
    • org.springframework.batch.item.ItemStreamSupport
      • org.springframework.batch.item.support.AbstractItemStreamItemReader<com.marklogic.client.query.CountedDistinctValue>

extends org.springframework.batch.item.support.AbstractItemStreamItemReader<com.marklogic.client.query.CountedDistinctValue>
